# scipy

- **Source Code:** [https://github.com/scipy/scipy](https://github.com/scipy/scipy)
- **Supported versions:**

<details markdown="1" open>
<summary><strong>1.15.2 (latest)</strong></summary>

```bash
pip install scipy --index-url https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/56254198/packages/pypi/simple
```

- **License:** BSD-3-Clause
- **Download files:** [https://gitlab.com/riseproject/python/wheel_builder/-/packages/37808270](https://gitlab.com/riseproject/python/wheel_builder/-/packages/37808270)
- **Patch applied for this version:** [https://gitlab.com/riseproject/python/wheel_builder/-/tree/main/wheel_builder/scipy/patches/v1.15.2](https://gitlab.com/riseproject/python/wheel_builder/-/tree/main/wheel_builder/scipy/patches/v1.15.2)

{: .warning }
> We disable the following tests as suggested in [#22839](https://github.com/scipy/scipy/issues/22839)
>
> - test_nan_inputs[sph_harm]
> - test_quad_vec_pool
> - test_quad_vec_pool_args
> - test_19_parallelization
> - TestDifferentialEvolutionSolver::test_parallel
>
> We also disable test_nan_inputs[sph_harm] as it is known to fail on riscv64 (see [#22753](https://github.com/scipy/scipy/issues/22753))

</details>
